name: the satchel
identity: The satchel is the sole possession of a dying man, containing a single knife, dried roots, and a carved wooden figurine. It symbolizes his personal belongings and the remnants of his life before the sickness.
current_status: The satchel remains open on the thawing earth, its contents left exposed as the healer monitors the dying man's condition. It is not touched again during the observation period.

appearance.value: A worn leather satchel, its contents spilled onto the ground

role.value: Personal possession of a dying man

volatile_state.location: On the thawing earth, near the dying man
volatile_state.current_activity: Remains open with contents spilled onto the ground, unattended during the observation period
